heading: Williamson County, Texas, water recycling and reuse project
label: 390h–19 Williamson County, Texas, water recycling and reuse project
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 390h–17a of this titlePub. L. 109–70

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the Lower Colorado River Authority, Texas, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of permanent facilities to reclaim and reuse water in Williamson County, Texas.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the costs of the project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation and maintenance of the project described in subsection (a).
